description_long: This is a white, cylindrical cup with a slightly faceted exterior and a sturdy handle attached to one side. The cup features a prominent red circular logo with the text 'AMES INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION' and additional smaller text encircling a stylized geometric design. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with some subtle shading and wear near the base. The interior is plain and unadorned, matching the exterior's white color. The handle is robust and angular, providing a comfortable grip for holding the cup.
description: A white, faceted cup with a red logo and a sturdy handle, featuring a matte finish and subtle wear.
description_view_0: Partial side view showing the cup's white body and a glimpse of the red logo on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white surface and the full handle extending from the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible logo, showing the cup's faceted shape.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the red logo and text prominently, with the handle on the left.
